name: atelier
description: Atelier AI coding runtime for Antigravity. Context, code-intel, memory, and tracing for agentic workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Atelier tools and agents for agy.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the Atelier MCP server, specialized agents (code, explore, repair, research, review), and skills for Antigravity. Always prefer Atelier MCP tools for file I/O, search, edits, and shell work.
